hero.title: Get help with events, registrations, results, and payments
hero.description: Start here if you need help with event details, registration status, results, rankings, payments, or account access.

categories.title: Choose the topic that matches your question
categories.description: Use the section below that best matches what you need to solve.

registrations.title: Registrations
registrations.description: Check whether registration is open and where to continue or review a registration.

eventInformation.title: Event information
eventInformation.description: Find start times, entry fees, course details, and event-day instructions on the event page.

results.title: Results
results.description: Find official results and learn why a time or placing might change after review.

rankings.title: Rankings
rankings.description: See how rankings update when new results are added or corrected.

payments.title: Payments and confirmations
payments.description: Payment missing? Confirmation email not received? Start here.

accountBasics.title: Account basics
accountBasics.description: Learn when you need an account and what to do if you cannot access the right one.

faqGroups.title: Clear answers to the questions we get most
faqGroups.description: Pick the question that matches your situation. If a race organizer sets the rule, we call that out clearly.

registrations.title: Registrations
registrations.description: Most registration questions start on the event page or in My Registrations.

checkStatus.question: How do I know whether registration is open for an event?
paragraphs: Open the event page first. It shows whether registration is open, closed, not open yet, or paused.
The same page is also the best place to check the race date, current edition, and any runner instructions before you start.

continueRegistration.question: Where do I continue a started registration or review my registration details?
paragraphs: Sign in with the account you used for the registration, then open My Registrations. That is where you can continue an unfinished registration or review a completed one.
If you expected to see a registration and it is missing, contact support with the event name and any registration ID or ticket code you have.

eventInformation.title: Event information
eventInformation.description: Use the event page first for schedules, course details, prices, and participant instructions.

findEventDetails.question: Where should I look for event details, schedules, and participant instructions?
paragraphs: Start with the event page. It should have the latest public details for that race, including schedule, fees, and runner instructions.
If something important is missing or unclear, contact the Race Director or support and include the event name.

organizerPolicies.question: Who controls pricing, waivers, cancellations, or other event-specific rules?
paragraphs: The Race Director sets prices, waivers, cancellations, transfers, and other event-specific rules.
If a rule is missing or unclear on the event page, contact support and include the event name and your registration details.

results.title: Results
results.description: Official results can be updated if the race organizer fixes a time, placing, or classification.

findOfficialResults.question: Where do I find official results on RunGoMX?
paragraphs: Go to the Results page to search by runner name, bib, or event.
If you already know the race, open that event's results page to see the latest official version.

unexpectedResult.question: Why might a result look different from what I expected?
paragraphs: A result can change if the race organizer corrects timing data, placements, or classifications after review.
If your result still looks wrong after checking the latest results page, contact support with the event name and participant details.

rankings.title: Rankings
rankings.description: Rankings update when new results are added or an existing result is corrected.

howRankingsUpdate.question: How do rankings get updated?
paragraphs: Rankings update automatically when new race results are added or an existing result is corrected.
If you see a change, check the related Results page first to confirm the latest race data.

missingRanking.question: What should I do if I am missing from a ranking?
paragraphs: First make sure your result is already listed and correct on the Results page.
If your result is there and you still do not appear in the ranking, contact support with the event name and participant details.

payments.title: Payments and confirmations
payments.description: Start by checking your registration. Most payment questions are easier to solve once you know whether your spot is confirmed.

paymentNoConfirmation.question: I started a payment or registration but did not get the confirmation I expected. What should I check first?
paragraphs: Sign in and open My Registrations. Check whether your registration is still in progress, waiting for payment, or already confirmed.
If you still do not see the right status, contact support with the event name, the email you used, and any ticket code or registration ID.

refundsCharges.question: Who handles refunds, charge questions, or payment disputes?
paragraphs: Refunds, charge questions, and disputes depend on the race organizer's rules and the status of your registration.
Check the event page first, then contact support with the event name, your registration details, and any payment reference.

accountBasics.title: Account basics
accountBasics.description: You can browse public pages without signing in, but registrations and account details live behind sign-in.

needAccount.question: Do I need an account to use RunGoMX?
paragraphs: You can browse events, results, rankings, and help without an account.
You do need an account to continue a registration, review past registrations, or manage details linked to your registration.

accessProblem.question: What if I cannot access the account connected to my registration?
paragraphs: Start from the sign-in page and try the email address you may have used for the registration.
If you still cannot reach the right account, contact support with the event name, participant name, and possible email address.

cta.title: Still need help?
cta.description: When you contact us, include the event name, the email you used, and any registration ID or ticket code so we can help faster.

relatedLinks.title: Go straight to the main public pages
relatedLinks.description: If you need to check a page or record, these are the fastest next steps.

events.title: Events
events.description: Browse event pages and check registration status, dates, prices, and other key details.

results.title: Results
results.description: Search official results and open the latest results page for a race.

rankings.title: Rankings
rankings.description: See the latest rankings built from current race results.

home.title: Homepage
home.description: Go back to the homepage and choose another part of the public site.
